privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated browser bookmarks injected via setup_task.sh. The verified default download directory is /home/ga/Documents/Rx_Transfers, the homepage is dailymed.nlm.nih.gov, the required search engine keywords are 'ndc' and 'fda', and the explicitly required bookmark folders are 'Drug Information', 'Shortages & Recalls', 'Regulatory & Guidelines', and 'Unauthorized_Personal', matching the task description and verifier.py constraints exactly.
